value_signal: OpenAI advertises up to $1,000 in API credits for early-stage researchers with limited financial or institutional resources.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The public form is aimed at early-stage researchers in countries supported by OpenAI's API and is especially intended for researchers with limited financial and institutional resources.
deadline_or_currentness: Public form is open; applications are reviewed once every three months and credits are credited 4-6 weeks after a decision.
best_fit_track: Early-stage research concept using public AI Monkey facts
evidence_gate: Approved application plus visible API credit delivery or other official confirmation.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a one-page research concept and a privacy-safe evidence note using only public AI Monkey facts.
human_must_do_next: Human owner must confirm the research profile and submit any application.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The credits are real, but no accepted application or usable credit balance has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If the project can truthfully be framed as research, build a no-spend application outline and list the exact public facts needed for the form.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved application or visible usable-credit delivery.
